tasks.instruction: Register a 10-year-old for the lowest-priced weekday beginner youth choir that rehearses after 5:00 PM and costs no more than $350.

tasks.instruction: For a Friday evening concert in May, choose balcony seating and add 2 of the lowest-priced available balcony tickets to the cart.

tasks.instruction: Compare voice lesson packages that each include at least 8 lessons and enroll in the option with the lowest total price.

tasks.instruction: Add one adult ensemble that meets on Monday, one on Wednesday, and one on Thursday to the schedule planner, making sure each rehearsal is on a different day.

tasks.instruction: Register for a weekend adult sight-reading workshop that lasts at least 2 hours and costs no more than $80.
tasks.name: Register for a weekend adult sight-reading workshop that lasts at least 2 hours and costs no more than $80.

tasks.instruction: Use the website’s donation form to make a one-time donation of at least $75 directed to the scholarship fund that provides tuition assistance for youth singers.

tasks.instruction: Book the earliest available Saturday high school audition slot that starts between 10:00 AM and 11:00 AM.

target_names: Spring 2026 High School Choir Auditions – Saturday 10:00 AM

tasks.instruction: Subscribe to the organization’s concert email newsletter by entering your name and email and selecting at least three different interest categories before submitting the form.

tasks.instruction: Use the build-your-own mini subscription option to select 3 different eligible concerts, including at least one holiday concert, keeping the total of their base ticket prices at or below $120 before adding the subscription to the cart.
